headline: Adobe Downgraded Despite AI Updates. The Stock Drops.
summary: Adobe  stock was down Monday after a  Mizuho  analyst downgraded shares of the creative software company, citing concerns that growth will remain pressured due to continued competitive pressures.  Gregg Moskowitz downgraded shares of  Adobe  to Neutral from Outperform and cut his price target to $270 from $315 on Monday.  Barron’s has reached out to Adobe for comment.

headline: Bridgewater CIO says AI poses existential threat to software firms
summary: Investing.com -- Bridgewater Associates said Monday that artificial intelligence poses an existential threat to legacy software companies, drawing parallels to how Amazon disrupted traditional bookstores in the 1990s.

headline: Mizuho Downgrades Adobe to Neutral: Is the Creative Software King Losing to AI?
summary: Mizuho downgraded Adobe (NASDAQ:ADBE) to Neutral from Outperform on Monday, slashing its price target to $270 from $315. The firm cited intensifying AI competition in the prosumer and small business segments, warning that the threat could erode Adobe’s long-term terminal value. For long-term investors, the analyst downgrade adds a cautious voice to a stock already ... Mizuho Downgrades Adobe to Neutral: Is the Creative Software King Losing to AI?

headline: Jay Chaudhry, Zscaler CEO: A Fortt Knox Update
summary: Zscaler CEO Jay Chaudhry tells Jon Fortt that AI is making cyber attacks 10–20X easier. Agents now find vulnerabilities even from binaries, no source code required. His thesis: stop trying to patch every flaw. Hide assets behind a zero-trust exchange so attackers can't see them at all. CISOs are flooding inbound calls since Mythos dropped. The next era prices security by agents and tokens, not seats. Tomorrow's weakest link is the agent.

The next era prices security by agents and tokens, not seats. Tomorrow's weakest link is the agent.
